name: Check What Posts are Driving Engagement on Synup Social
body_para:
To win the social media game, it’s important to keep testing and revising your strategy based on which posts get the most engagement. With new content being posted all the time, it can be tough to tell which posts are generating the most traffic and engagement in the long run. That’s why we created a revolutionary analytics dashboard as part of Synup Social! Let’s take a look at how to use the Synup Social dashboard to see which posts are driving engagement in real time.

‍

First, go to the analytics dashboard on your Synup Social profile.

On the dashboard, you can see your engagement metrics. Click on any day to see your daily stats. 

There, you’ll be able to see:

  • what you posted that day
  • how many likes you received (and on what posts)
  • which posts received comments
  • how many clicks your posts received
  • how many people shared your posts

‍

This is a great feature, since it lets you monitor post performance over time. While social media is sometimes thought of as an of-the-moment game, sometimes old posts will get engagement for months after they’re posted!

‍

Our analytics dashboard will show you what posts are driving engagement in real time, so you can post more content that your audience likes at the moment.

‍

We can’t wait to see what you do.

‍

Happy posting!
use_case_summary: Discover which posts are fueling engagement on Synup Social with our powerful analytics tool.

seo.title: Check What Posts are Driving Engagement on Synup Social | Synup
seo.description: Discover which posts are fueling engagement on Synup Social with our powerful analytics tool. Track your social media performance and optimize your content strategy for maximum impact. Sign up now for a free trial and take your social media game to the next level!
